channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.
